description_long: This is a single right-handed glove designed for robust use, likely in industrial or technical environments. The glove features a black, textured palm and fingers, providing enhanced grip and durability, while the back and wrist area are covered in a light gray, flexible fabric. The wrist is reinforced with a blue, rigid-looking band, possibly for added support or to secure the glove in place. There is a visible closure mechanism on the back, likely a velcro strap, for adjustable fit. Subtle stitching and paneling details are present, with some darker gray reinforcement patches on the back and sides. The overall construction suggests a focus on protection, comfort, and secure fit for urban or work-related activities.
description: A rugged, black and gray glove with a blue wrist band and velcro closure, designed for grip and protection in urban or work settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black palm and fingers, light gray back, and blue wrist band with a visible zipper or seam.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the black reinforcement patch on the back and the layered wrist area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large black patch covering the back of the hand and the blue wrist band.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the velcro strap closure and additional gray reinforcement patches.
